debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
⊢ U ∼ V ↔ ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id

failed_attempts: exists_congr bijective_iff_has_inverse

by
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, hf_inj, hf_onto⟩
    let g := fun y => Classical.choose (hf_onto y)
    use f, g
    have hfg : ∀ y, f (g y) = y := fun y => Classical.choose_spec (hf_onto y)
    exact ⟨funext hfg, funext (fun x => hf_inj (hfg (f x)))⟩
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩

    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 h; rw [←congr_fun hgf x1, ←congr_fun hgf x2, h]
    · intro y; use g y; exact congr_fun hfg y

by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ from h
    use f, inverse f hf
    exact ⟨inverse_id1 hf, inverse_id2 hf⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ from h
    use f
    constructor
    · intros x1 x2 h1
      have h2 : g (f x1) = g (f x2) := by rw [h1]
      rw [← comp_app, ← comp_app, hgf, id_def, id_def] at h2
      exact h2
    · intro y
      use g y
      rw [← comp_app, hfg, id_def]
